sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Title
(I) On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it Appropriation
sections.text:
is hereby confirmed that there was expended from the general
revenues of the Republic, such moneys indicated in respect of the
services of the Republic specified in the third column of the
Schedule, being expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated
for the services of the Republic by the Aprropriation Act, 2008.
Single copies of this Act may be obtainedf rom the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, JOJO/ Lusaka. Price K2,000
